items.name: Valentine's Day Package
items.description: ( Only for Feb 14 2026) ($140) Please put your item preference in the notes section. Thank you. Box Content: Whole grilled Tilapia or Grilled Turkey wings Jollof rice or Vermicilli noodles Plantain or Sweet potato fries with sauce Fruit salad Chocolate Cookies Non Alcoholic wine (Sweet Red wine on request at an extra cost)
items.simplified_description: Special Valentine's Day meal box with grilled fish or turkey and sides.
items.other_info: Seasonal item, available only on Feb 14, 2026

items.name: Asun Rice
items.description: A mix of long grain rice and gently cooked goatmeat in our authentic traditional spicy sauce bursting with flavor.
items.simplified_description: Long grain rice with spicy cooked goat meat.

items.name: Jollof Rice
items.description: Sure one of the most popular dishes in our kitchen. Takes you right back to memory lane of Nigerian party rice with bursting flavors and smokiness. Made with long grain rice and cooked in a blend of roma tomatoes, bell peppers, onions and habanero.
items.simplified_description: Spicy Nigerian party rice cooked with tomatoes, peppers, onions, and habanero.

items.name: Fried Rice
items.description: Perfectly cooked, herbs infused stir-fry rice. Filled with diced liver , shrimps and mixed vegetables.
items.simplified_description: Herb-infused stir-fried rice with liver, shrimp, and mixed vegetables.

items.name: Coconut Rice
items.simplified_description: Rice cooked with coconut flavors.

items.name: Palmoil/Native Rice
items.simplified_description: Rice cooked with palm oil in a traditional style.

items.simplified_description: Mashed black-eyed beans cooked to softness.

items.name: Jollof Spaghetti
items.simplified_description: Spaghetti cooked in spicy Jollof sauce.

items.description: Fresh yam cooked in a blend of bell peppers, onion and habanero pepper.
items.simplified_description: Yam cooked with bell peppers, onions, and spicy habanero.
